AI Mall Website Content.pdf.content:
1. HOME (Landing Page)
Hero Section
Headline:
The Unified Marketplace for Enterprise-Grade AI.
Subheadline:
Where businesses discover, deploy, and scale AI solutions in one connected
ecosystem.
CTA Buttons:
‚óè Explore A-Series‚Ñ¢
‚óè Partner With Us
Note: Add a small badge:
AISA‚Ñ¢ & AI Calling ‚Äî In Progress (Coming Soon)
Value Pillars
‚óè One Platform, Multiple AI Apps
A-Series‚Ñ¢ delivers business-ready automation and cognitive intelligence
across multiple verticals.
‚óè Enterprise-Grade Architecture
Built for scale, security, and plug-and-play integrations.
‚óè AI Marketplace
A curated hub for professional, enterprise and consumer AI applications.
Sneak Peek of A-Series‚Ñ¢
Show 6‚Äì8 tiles:
‚óè Aibiz‚Ñ¢
‚óè Aistream‚Ñ¢
‚óè AIHIRE
‚óè Aistudio‚Ñ¢

-- 1 of 9 --

‚óè Aihome‚Ñ¢
‚óè AiOffice‚Ñ¢
‚óè AiDesk‚Ñ¢
‚óè Aisales‚Ñ¢
Small Tagline:
‚ÄúMore modules launching every month.‚Äù
AI-Mall Vision Block
A short 3-line corporate positioning statement:
AI-Mall is designed as a multi-layer intelligent commerce fabric that powers the next
wave of digital transformation.
From automation to analytics to AI-driven decisioning ‚Äî we unify everything into a
single operating canvas.
2. ABOUT US
Company Overview
AI-Mall‚Ñ¢ is a next-generation AI commerce layer built under UWO (Unified Web
Options).
We consolidate AI applications, automation stacks, and partner innovations into a
unified ecosystem designed for enterprises, creators, and global technology
companies.
Our Mission
To accelerate AI adoption by eliminating complexity and delivering ready-to-deploy
digital intelligence.
What We Are Building
‚óè A multi-category AI marketplace

-- 2 of 9 --

‚óè A-Series‚Ñ¢ ‚Äî our flagship SaaS product suite
‚óè AISA‚Ñ¢ ‚Äî conversational AI assistant (in progress)
‚óè AI Calling‚Ñ¢ ‚Äî autonomous AI voice agents (coming soon)
‚óè ACOS‚Ñ¢ ‚Äî Autonomous Commerce OS (patent-ready framework)
Leadership
Gurumukh P. Ahuja ‚Äî Founder & Chief Architect
A visionary leader building a global ecosystem of AI, consciousness-based
intelligence, and scalable digital infrastructure.
3. A-SERIES‚Ñ¢ (Product Stack Page)
Headline:
Your All-In-One AI Operating Layer for Business.
Introduction Copy:
A-Series‚Ñ¢ consolidates automation, insights, and AI-driven execution into an
integrated portfolio of purpose-built applications.
Each module is optimized for speed, reliability, and enterprise-grade outcomes.
Modules (Each with a One-Liner)
‚óè Aibiz‚Ñ¢ ‚Äî Business Intelligence OS
Real-time analytics, forecasting, and automated reporting.
‚óè Aistream‚Ñ¢ ‚Äî Media & Content Automation
Autogenerate, manage, and distribute content at scale.
‚óè Aicraft‚Ñ¢ ‚Äî Workflow & Task Automation
Build autonomous workflows with zero human friction.
‚óè AiOffice‚Ñ¢ ‚Äî Smart Workspace Suite
Meetings, docs, scheduling, and collaboration powered by AI.
‚óè Aistudio‚Ñ¢ ‚Äî Creative Engine
Design, audio, video, and campaign generation.
‚óè AiSales‚Ñ¢ ‚Äî Sales Acceleration Platform
Prospecting, outreach automation, and intelligent pipelines.
‚óè AiDesk‚Ñ¢ ‚Äî Support Automation
AI-powered helpdesk with autonomous ticket resolution.

-- 3 of 9 --

‚óè Aihome‚Ñ¢ ‚Äî Personal AI Suite
For consumers, productivity, finance, and home automation.
Coming Soon (Must Add Here)
‚óè AISA‚Ñ¢ ‚Äî Autonomous AI Agent
Real-time workflows, voice interactions, memory layers. (In Development)
‚óè AI Calling‚Ñ¢ ‚Äî Voice Intelligence Engine
24√ó7 AI calling for sales, support, onboarding. (Coming Soon)
CTA:
Partner Early ‚Üí Join the A-Series‚Ñ¢ Innovation Program
4. PARTNER WITH US
Headline:
Co-Build the Future of Global AI Commerce.
Subheading:
We‚Äôre onboarding select technology companies, SaaS providers, automation studios,
and AI product teams for early integration into AI-Mall.
Why Partner with Us
‚óè Access to a global multi-category marketplace
‚óè API future readiness
‚óè Distribution to SMBs, enterprises & creators
‚óè Branding visibility under AI-Mall‚Ñ¢
‚óè Joint GTM & co-marketing opportunities
‚óè UWO-supported IP governance
Partnership Streams
‚óè SaaS Vendor Integration
‚óè AI Tool Providers
‚óè Automation Agencies

-- 4 of 9 --

‚óè Developer Ecosystems
‚óè Enterprise Solutions Teams
‚óè Global MNC Integrations
Callout Banner:
AISA‚Ñ¢ & AI Calling ‚Äî In Progress. Early collaboration available.
CTA:
Apply for Partnership ‚Üí
5. CONTACT / GET IN TOUCH
Simple clean page with the following:
Corporate Contact
‚óè Unified Web Options (UWO‚Ñ¢)
Tech Headquarters ‚Äî India
Global offices launching soon.

partners@ai-mall.in

enterprise@ai-mall.in
For Support:
support@ai-mall.in

-- 5 of 9 --
